problem.item1_description: Spreadsheets, messages, and memories make it hard to trust what's been done.
problem.item2_description: Without clear due dates or hour counters, critical work slips quietly.

faq.title: Everything rental operators ask us
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions
faq.item1_q: What is fleet maintenance management software?
faq.item1_a: A platform that centralizes the maintenance history of each boat (engine hours, replaced parts, interventions), schedules upcoming maintenance according to calendar or hourly thresholds, and alerts before critical operations become overdue.
faq.item2_a: No. FleetAi helps you know when and what to schedule. Your mechanic (internal or external) remains essential for doing the work.
faq.item3_q: My boats don't have connected sensors. Does it still work?
faq.item3_a: Yes. FleetAi is designed for manual entry of engine hours (by you, your skipper, or your mechanic). If you want to connect sensors (NMEA 2000, Yacht Devices), that's possible on the Enterprise plan.
faq.item4_q: How much does FleetAi cost for 15 boats?
faq.item4_a: $29/month on the Pro plan, regardless of the number of users. No hidden fees.
faq.item5_q: Can I migrate from another tool?
faq.item5_a: Yes — we import Excel, Google Sheets, Airtable. For marine tools (BoatDeck, Sea-Trax), we have a dedicated import.
faq.item6_q: Is my data retained if I cancel my subscription?
faq.item6_a: For 90 days after cancellation, you can export in CSV/PDF. After that, permanent deletion (GDPR).

testimonials.title: Trusted by real operators
testimonials.item1_quote: Since FleetAi, I know what needs doing before it starts squeaking. The AI reports save me an hour every week.
testimonials.item2_quote: Our entire maintenance log is now in one place. No more chasing spreadsheets across three email threads.
testimonials.item3_quote: As a solo owner with two boats, the urgent dashboard is a game-changer. I never miss a service interval.
testimonials.item4_quote: Maintenance used to be the thing I dreaded. Now I check the dashboard once a week and I'm done.
testimonials.item5_quote: The AI suggestions caught a motor service I'd pushed three times. Saved us from a broken-down rental.
testimonials.item6_quote: Migrating from our old Excel was easier than expected. Two hours and we had 8 years of history imported.

three_things.title: Three things, done right.
three_things.item1_description: Every intervention, every part, every engine hour. Nothing is lost, nothing is reinvented.
three_things.item2_description: Calendar or engine hours — FleetAi calculates thresholds and alerts you before you fall behind.
three_things.item3_description: The Mistral assistant reads your fleet and suggests what to do — not blabla, actual actions.

bento_grid.title: Everything you need to run your fleet
bento_grid.item1_description: Your pontoons at a glance — boat status, last inspection, upcoming tasks.
bento_grid.item2_description: Drag, drop, done. Switch between timeline and board view in one click.
bento_grid.item3_description: Log a check from the pontoon. No office, no paper, no delay.
bento_grid.item4_description: Upload once — FleetAi auto-classifies certificates, manuals and insurance.
bento_grid.item5_description: One account, multiple fleets. Strict data isolation per organization.
bento_grid.item6_description: One-click export for audits, insurance renewals and regulatory checks.

case_study.title: From 14 boats in a spreadsheet to 22 boats running smoothly
case_study.subtitle: Case study
case_study.challenge: In 2023, Marina Bleue managed 14 sailboats using a shared Excel, WhatsApp voice messages, and the mechanic's memory. As the fleet grew, maintenance fell through the cracks. They lost two rental days to emergency repairs — and nearly failed a safety inspection.
case_study.solution: They migrated 8 years of maintenance history into FleetAi in one afternoon. Within a week, every boat had a complete digital profile. The AI surfaced 6 overdue tasks they hadn't noticed. The team set up recurring reminders for engine hours and seasonal checks.
case_study.result1: Grew from 14 to 22 boats without adding headcount
case_study.result2: Zero missed rentals due to unplanned maintenance
case_study.result3: 100% pass rate on last safety inspection
case_study.cta_text: See how it works for your fleet

pro.name: Pro
pro.idealFor1: You manage a rental fleet or sailing school
pro.idealFor3: You need urgent alerts before your customers complain
pro.quote_text: The AI saved us from a broken-down rental. It's worth 10x the price.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.idealFor1: You manage multiple organizations or marinas
enterprise.idealFor2: You need SSO, SLA guarantees, and custom workflows
enterprise.idealFor3: You have compliance and reporting requirements
enterprise.quote_text: We needed full control over user provisioning. Enterprise was the obvious choice.

compare.title: What you get (all plans)
compare.item4: Tasks by date or engine hours

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.item1_a: You go back to the Starter plan (free) if you haven't chosen anything. No data lost.
faq.item2_q: Can I change plans at any time?
faq.item3_a: Yes. Unlimited CSV/PDF export from the Pro plan. EU hosting.
faq.item4_a: No. The displayed price is all-inclusive.
faq.item5_q: Does AI see other customers' data?
faq.item6_q: How many users can I add per organization?
faq.item6_a: Unlimited users on all plans. You pay per organization, not per seat.
faq.item7_q: Can I import my existing Excel data?
faq.item7_a: Yes. FleetAi imports CSV, Excel, Google Sheets. For specific maritime tools (BoatDeck, Sea-Trax), we have a dedicated importer. Most teams are fully migrated in under 2 hours.
faq.item8_q: Is there an API to connect my other tools?
faq.item8_a: REST API access is available on the Enterprise plan. Pro users can use webhooks for basic integrations.
faq.item9_q: What happens if I exceed 3 boats on the Starter plan?
faq.item9_a: You'll be prompted to upgrade to Pro. Your existing data is never locked — you can always export.

about.meta_description: Giving maritime professionals the tools of the land. FleetAi was born from frustration with spreadsheets.
about.hero_title: Giving maritime people the tools of land people.
about.hero_subtitle: Rental operators, marinas and sailing schools manage their fleet with Excel and the shipyard mechanic's memory. We think they deserve better.
about.mission_statement: Maritime teams deserve the same operational clarity as any tech company.
about.mission_body: We build tools that respect the complexity of the sea and the simplicity that operators need on the dock.
about.story_p1: In 2024, after two seasons watching an 18-boat marina manage its maintenance in a spreadsheet, we said: we can do better than a shared Excel. FleetAi was born from frustration and a rainy Sunday.
about.story_p2: Today, we support 40+ fleets in France, and we're building with them the tool we wish we'd had.
about.value1_description: Every feature is tested on the pontoon before it arrives in the app.
about.value2_description: A recorded event cannot be modified. That's the contract.
about.value3_description: AI suggests, doesn't decide. You remain the captain.
about.value4_description: Your data is always readable, exportable, and understandable — no vendor lock-in, no black box.
about.value5_description: French maritime regulations built-in: CE navigation categories, Francisation numbers, safety equipment tracking.
about.cta_subtitle: 14 days free, we'll handle the rest.
about.timeline_item1_description: Started after two seasons watching a marina manage 18 boats in a single spreadsheet
about.timeline_item2_description: First paying customers — rental operators and sailing schools in Southern France
about.timeline_item3_description: Integrated Mistral AI to deliver contextual maintenance suggestions per fleet
about.timeline_item4_description: Supporting teams across France, with Enterprise plans for marinas and ports
about.press_item1_quote: The tool that maritime professionals have been waiting for.
about.press_item2_quote: FleetAi is transforming how marinas approach maintenance.
about.press_item3_quote: Finally, an AI tool that understands maritime reality.
